com.thogicalsplont.tgwands - package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands
The root package for the TGWands mod.
com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block - package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block
Contains all block-related classes for the TGWands mod.
com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.custom - package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.block.custom
Contains custom block implementations for the TGWands mod.
com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.client - package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.client
Contains all client-side classes for the TGWands mod.
com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.config - package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.config
Contains configuration-related classes for the TGWands mod.
com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.entity - package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.entity
Contains all entity-related classes for the TGWands mod.
com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.entity.custom - package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.entity.custom
Contains custom entity implementations for the TGWands mod.
com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.item - package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.item
Contains all item-related classes for the TGWands mod.
com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.item.custom - package com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.item.custom
Contains custom item implementations for the TGWands mod.
Config - Class in com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.config
Configuration class for the TGWands mod.
Config() - Constructor for class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.config.Config
Default constructor for Config.
CREATIVE_MODE_TABS - Static variable in class com.thogicalsplont.tgwands.TGWands
Deferred register for creative mode tabs under the mod namespace.
